title: Gan Fall and the Sky Battle — Part 5
description: Gan Fall, the priests, and the Shandia warriors show how dangerous Skypiea’s dials and sky combat can be.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Conis, Wyper, Shandia warriors, Satori. Gan Fall, the priests, and the Shandia warriors show how dangerous Skypiea’s dials and sky combat can be.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: This island doesn't need two gods!!

summary: Gan Fall, the priests, and the Shandia warriors show how dangerous Skypiea’s dials and sky combat can be.
